title:

content:
## Maternal birth injury rates for 2025 New Zealand
Information around how many MBIs per DHB
Looking at staffing / Physios/ need to for further education
Planning ahead dependent on numbers

### Response from Accident Compensation Corporation
Status Dataset submitted
Comments You can find the requested data for maternal birth injury rates by health district in 2025 here: https://catalogue.data.govt.nz/dataset/gov-048192-maternal-birth-injury-rates-for-2025

#### Likely Source Agency
Accident Compensation Corporation
